summary: The author secured 1st place in the annual Santa competition, taking advantage of the format's lack of execution time restrictions. They provide a direct link to their repository containing the full solution code and a detailed explanation in both English and Japanese. The writeup itself is minimal, serving primarily as an introduction and pointer to the external documentation.
extensive_summary:
## Overview
The provided writeup is a brief acknowledgment rather than a technical breakdown. The author expresses gratitude to the competition organizers and notes their appreciation for the Santa competition's format, specifically highlighting the absence of program execution time restrictions.

## Repository and Documentation
All technical details, including the complete solution pipeline, are hosted externally in the author's GitHub repository. The writeup directs readers to this repository for the full implementation and a comprehensive explanation available in both English and Japanese.

## Technical Content
The markdown text itself does not contain any explicit information regarding data handling, model architectures, training strategies, or validation schemes. Consequently, no technical methodology can be extracted from this specific writeup, and all implementation specifics must be consulted directly in the linked codebase.
